title: AI Engineer
experience_requirement: 2+ years of production machine learning or AI engineering experience
job_description:
1. Build production AI capabilities for investigative and public-safety software.
2. Develop LLM and retrieval-augmented generation features for case information.
3. Design document chunking, embedding, indexing, and vector-search pipelines.
4. Improve prompt design, grounding, citation quality, and model evaluation.
5. Integrate speech recognition, transcription, and NLP components.
6. Deploy secure services in AWS and government-cloud environments.
7. Create monitoring and testing for accuracy, latency, and reliability.
8. Work with product and engineering teams to define user-facing workflows.
9. Handle sensitive information with appropriate privacy and security controls.
10. Write maintainable Python services and data-processing pipelines.
11. Bring at least two years of production ML or AI engineering experience.
12. Communicate model limitations and support responsible operational use.
company_details:
Flash AI develops investigative software intended to help law-enforcement and public-safety teams organize and analyze case information.
The company applies language, retrieval, and speech technologies to reduce manual work while emphasizing secure handling of sensitive data.
